title: EverLush; The Garden
description:
A modpack while mostly inspired by Terraria; stands as a love letter of all the games' I cherish in my heart.
Explore the land of the Lushes and what is to come. Discover what left it all to ruin.
body:
Adventure through the lands of the Lushes and the ruins of once-bountiful kingdoms. Uncover the tragedies that befell the world and the Goddess who abandoned the very creation she once cherished.

### Survive
Endure the harsh wilderness. Hunt, harvest crops, explore, and prepare for the changing seasons as nature relentlessly tests you.
Carefully manage temperature, limb health, thirst, and hunger as you progress.

### Sculk and the Nether
Parallels of the Sculk and the Nether are as night and day and are mandatory to explore before reaching the end. 
Wherever everyone went, I don't think they made it out.

### Progression
A custom, extended progression system designed to feel native to Minecraft, inspired by Terraria.
Normal, Hard, and Expert modes are locked behind progression, featuring deep crafting trees that encourage exploration.
Everything is built to feel like it truly belongs within Minecraft; expanding the experience without breaking its identity.

### Classes
Forge your own build with 10 unique origins and a progression-based leveling system rooted in the clans that shaped the world before its fall.

Authors note: I invite you to the Discord Server as a means to share feedback and reccomendations! I love input <3
